messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: A standing Operator topic on Telegram — one always-there front door to the restricted Operator
What it solves: THE ASK, IN HIS WORDS: "Could the operator have its own Telegram topic so I can interact with
it there?" One persistent, pinned topic that IS the Operator's home — the human talks to it any
time, without hunting for the right SUP-# thread or waiting for one to exist. During the
2026-07-13 incident …
How it works: The Operator topic exists without the human having to open an issue first

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-346 - A standing Operator topic on Telegram — one always-there front door to the restricted Operator is complete.
